entry.title: Re: Web dynpro
entry.content: Refer to the below mentioned answer.

entry.title: Re: SAP CTE comparing columns of same row condition is not working
entry.content: deleted

entry.title: Re: Web dynpro
entry.content:
Hi, 

Click on the 'ROOTUIELEMENTCONTAINER ' and change the Layout to RowLayout. The Ideal way would be to add a contrainer UI element with your own layout and then add the needed fields/attributes within your Container/Group UI elements. 

Regards,

Kiran

entry.title: Re: Multiple Ledgers in Public Cloud
entry.content:
①There are no plans that My customer will use IFRS yet.
In the future, they will use IFRS(Abroad expansion).
In this case, is it not necessary that My customer process 0L about closing operation?
If there is task, let me know about that.

Since customer has plans to use IFRS, it is must to activate leading and non-leading ledgers. 0L Being the leading ledger, all the posting will definitely go to this ledger so closing operation must also be performed. For tasks, you can refer to SAP Help. 

②
If they will use multiple local account standard (multiple countries), must they define such local account standard in 2L every company code?
※ At the time of introduction, they only need to activate 0L and 2L?

Since local ledger caters to country specific GAAP, yes they must define it for every country and do the configuration at company code level.  From the information provided here 0L and 2L appear sufficient but please have a look at the different scenarios recommended by SAP.

entry.title: Re: SAP CTE comparing columns of same row condition is no...
entry.content:
I have found the answer with chatgpt..it was due to my columns contain NULL values

 

3. Null Values

If either column1 or column2 contains NULL values, the comparison will not return TRUE because any comparison with NULL returns NULL. To handle NULL values, use IS NULL or COALESCE:

 

 
WITH cte_name AS (
    SELECT column1, column2    FROM table_name)
SELECT *
FROM cte_nameWHERE COALESCE(column1, '') = COALESCE(column2, '');

entry.title: Account determination for non stock purchase order
entry.content:
When we following the SAP tutorial of "Creating Purchase Order of Services" in 1LE scope item for S4HANA cloud public edition, it shows that the g/l account 51600000 is derived by material group YBMM01. 

We would like to change the predefined g/l account, but we cannot find the relative account determination configuration in IMG. Please advise where can we set this account assignment?

entry.title: Re: Cant access transaction in WEBGui for HTML via SAP Bu...
entry.content:
Thanks for your help!

The Solution was to enter my CloudFoundry org in the Whitelist of the Backend System.

Using a Whitelist for Clickjacking Framing Protection | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: I can not access the OData service from BAS.
entry.content:
Can you please tell use why do use the onInit und AfterRendering anyway? You can just use the default model without any JavaScript Code.

To make it more simple you can just this in the xml view:

<table:Table id="table" selectionMode="Single" rows="{/ZEMPLOYEEDATASet}" enableColumnReordering="false">
    <!-- columns for customer name, address, and email -->
    <table:columns>
        <table:Column id="idColumn3" width="50%">
            <table:label>
                <Label id="idLabel3" text="ID"/>
            </table:label>
            <table:template>
                <Text id="idText3" text="{Id}"/>
            </table:template>
        </table:Column>
        <table:Column id="idColumn1" width="20%">
            <table:label>
                <Label id="idLabel1" text="Name"/>
            </table:label>
            <table:template>
                <Text id="idText1" text="{Name}"/>
            </table:template>
        </table:Column>
        <table:Column id="idColumn2" width="30%">
            <table:label>
                <Label id="idLabel2" text="Address"/>
            </table:label>
            <table:template>
                <Text id="idText2" text="{Address}"/>
            </table:template>
        </table:Column>
        <table:Column id="idColumn4" width="50%">
            <table:label>
                <Label id="idLabel4" text="Phone Number"/>
            </table:label>
            <table:template>
                <Text id="idText4" text="{phonenumber}"/>
            </table:template>
        </table:Column>
    </table:columns>
</table:Table>

 and in the manifest json make the OData Model the default like this and remove the name "myODataModel":

"sap.ui5": {
  "models": {
   .....
      "": {
                "type": "sap.ui.model.odata.v2.ODataModel",
                "dataSource": "mainService",
                "settings": {
                    "defaultBindingMode": "TwoWay",
                    "defaultCountMode": "Inline"
                }
            }
    },
}

entry.title: Re: I can not access the OData service from BAS.
entry.content: Hi Mahmood, remove the leading "/" in the Manifest OData service url, i.e., "/sap/opu/odata/SAP/Z_EMPLOYEE_SRV/" to "sap/opu/odata/SAP/Z_EMPLOYEE_SRV/". Best Regards Kennys

entry.title: SetDimension filter on Level Based Hierarchy
entry.content:
Hello All,

I want to Dynamically pass filter on a Dimension which is a level based hierarchy.
TB_a.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("[C_c].[abc]", ["[[C_c].[abc].[Level1].&[" + v_xyz + "]"]);

C_c is the Dimension
abc is the hierarchy name
v_xyz  is the dynamic value for this which i want to pass.

but this isn't working, i have tried changing levels it still doesn't work.
i have tried other ways too, it some how doesn't work
Any clues?


@N1kh1l

entry.title: Re: New 2H 2024 SAP Successfactors Time (Tracking) Features

I do hope you remain an integral part of SAP Time Management Forum because you gave such a substantial meaning to it! The new Blog Author will need to have giant shoes to fill in! As always thank you very much for these wonderful posts, looking forward to check and use these new Features!! 

BR,

Evangelia

entry.title: How to find the relationship of PR and SO after MRP run
entry.content:
In MRP run, the PR is created but cannot show which sales order is created from. 

The account assignment of PR is empty. So, how can we able to check the PR is created by which SO?

entry.title: Re: Seamless planning integration between SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere - product FAQ
entry.content:
Hello @Max_Gander 

Kudos that we finally are going to learn about how the Seamless planning is coming to life and what it means in technical terms. 😄

I don't know, but somehow I had a different imagination, of the final result... I thought we would also achieve a really "seamless" data storage and loading.

One example: Since very often the granularity between Actuals and Plan data is different, we need to aggregate the Actuals data to the lowest common denominator in another table. In the past we did this in BW and loaded that data into the SAC Planning model (version Actuals).

Now, when we prepare this data in Datasphere, I thought we either could load it directly into the SAC Planning Table in Datasphere, without the need to load it into SAC (Planning model), which then is just another table next to the one, where the data originates from 🙈

Or we even could use a Union Fact View for the Planning & aggregated Actuals tables to expose this (just like a BW Composite Provider) to SAC for planning purposes. So the former Planning model would be a shell, reading the Actuals version from one table, and the Plan version from another. So, like in BW, you would define one table (DSO) as write-enabled.

This was how I imagined the upcoming solution. 😦

Question: If we combined the DSP SAC Plan table in a Union Fact View with another table and create an analytical model on top, how would be the version handling? Are we able to define the same column in the 2nd DSP table for the Union and work with it in a Live Story? Or will these planning tables not be consumeable via Fact View and Analytic model?

Thanks and BR,

Martin

entry.title: Re: CDS combine lines into one
entry.content:
Hi  @helge23 
for your example, you can use the following code:

DEFINE VIEW Z_Material_VIEW AS SELECT FROM Your_Source
{
    Material,
    MAX(Column1) AS Column1,
    MAX(Column2) AS Column2,
    MAX(Column3) AS Column3
}
GROUP BY Material;

This code will take the Material field, group the rows, and return the maximum non-null value for each column (Column1, Column2, Column3).

BR,
Oleg

entry.title: Re: Repository Job from script
entry.content:
Hi Ravi,

every repository job as its own ID. You can get the ID of the job for the repository at runtime and execute it.

In the following help page you find the necessary steps: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_IDENTITY_MANAGEMENT/4773a9ae1296411a9d5c24873a8d418c/be34676e419149419919b80729fd2ffa.html?locale=en-US&q=uRunJobNow

Note: Do not hard code the ID, it changes with every transport.

Regards

 Norman

entry.title: Re: SAP Omnichannel Promotion Pricing - Enable outbound processing using SAP Cloud Integration

I have tested your suggestions and it worked!

Many Thanks for your prompt response.

Pradeep

entry.title: Re: Creating an SAP Account (SAP Universal ID) and getting started in the community
entry.content:
Hi all,

My name is Bang. I'm learning about SAP BTP which is new knowledges to me. What's a wonderful forum to share knowledges to everyone. Thanks David and SAP support Team!

entry.title: WESOUT Badi ‘WES_SE_MERCHANDISE_OUTBOUND’ does not support individual error handling, what next?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m encountering an issue with WESOUT and need some assistance. Here’s the situation:

  1. Custom Field Mapping: We use the Badi ‘WES_SE_MERCHANDISE_OUTBOUND’ to map custom fields.
  2. Error Logging Requirement: I need to log an error if a material lacks a certain value.

The Problem:

  • When processing a small number of materials, WESOUT calls the Badi for each material individually.
  • However, when processing a large number of materials, WESOUT calls the Badi once for all materials.
  • This causes a logic issue: if I raise an error for one incorrect material, it results in an error for all materials.

Objective:

  • I want to keep both the custom field mapping and error logging in the same place.
  • Duplicating the custom code in multiple places is not ideal.

Challenge:

  • There is an object for logging just outside the Badi call, but it is not available within the Badi.

Request:

  • Does anyone have any suggestions on how to maintain the custom mapping logic and add individual error logging within the Badi?

Any ideas or insights would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Copy Measures across hierarchies member using Advance...
entry.content: Thank you for your reply. Sadly I can't restrict the scope setting this way because there are a lot of possibile combinations. Each Product can be in different flow per account. I also though that VARIABLEMEMBER and FOREACH would have been useful for the goal (as in the script sample of my last attempt), but no. Anyway, Above I have reported only an example of combination (which I just extended with more entries), but the requirements is to "iterate" every combination for flow !=# and valorize the above mentioned measures with the ones in flow = # (this should be done for each member and combination).

entry.title: Re: Fiori : Navigate from List to Detail Alternative
entry.content:
There is even a sample in the docs: https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/topic/a12ad6058db84e8cb60a3a9b2ade63fb

Basically you remove the standard navigation and replace it with something of your own like add a button or use the standard button to navigate

entry.title: Automation timeout issue in Virtual Machine
entry.content:
Good morning,

I am writing on this channel because I will need your help. I have many automations job executed from Virtual Machine, when we run the automation Jobs with a window open to check that everything is running correctly, the job is completed without errors. But when we don't have a window open on the virtual machine, the automation job fail.

The automations that are causing me problems interact directly in Sap S4 Hana Cloud Public. And I notice that when I don't have a window open on the VM, the display of the S4 site is slower than when I have a window open on the VM. 

I see that the automation passes the first authentication steps, but fails every time on the S4 Home Page and must click on the "Manage Fixed Assets" application. I found that by increasing the timeout to 10min on the "click - Manage Fixed Assets" step, the automation runs correctly. 

This is an unacceptable workaround because this automation must create more than 400 Fixed Assets. An operation that takes 1min with a window open on the VM, and 10min with no window open on the VM.

Has anyone encountered the same kind of problem ?
Regards,

entry.title: Re: Enter does not work when I deploy my RAP app in Fiori Launchpad
entry.content: Can you explain more in what context. I guess from your List Report? Where is your cursor when you press enter? In a Filter Field or does it update when you just press enter in general?

entry.title: DMC upload file Simulation error in Product object
entry.content:
Hi All, I have an issue while loading data for Product in DMC. Even though I am entering the value in field "Price Control" but still I am getting a simulation error :

Short Text

Specify a price control

Diagnosis

Owing to the material type, value-based inventory management is defined for this material. You are therefore required to enter a price control indicator.

 

Procedure

Specify the price control indicator.

 

 

Can someone help here on what is going wrong?

entry.title: Batch Determination/SO stock transfer
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to do stock transfer between SO stocks.

Transfer from:

Plant-1000/SLo-AA (batch were numbered based on GR date)

SO1/Batch 1001/stock 5pcs

SO2/Batch 1002/stock 10pcs

SO2/Batch 1003/stock 35pcs

Transfer to:

Plant-1000/SLo-AA

SO4/ Needed qty 17pcs

Is it possible to make this operation by using batch determination?

Target:

Indicate SO4 and 17pcs then system automatically assign Batch 1001-5pcs,Batch 1002-10pcs, Batch 1003-2pcs

Appreciate you help!

Regards

Shin

Hi 

We have account determination in  use SSCUI 100297  and select sourcing and procurement 

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Re: CDS : How to define Hierarchy View
entry.content:
In this blog, sample query ZLR_CONN_QUERY is based on Dimension ZLR_CONN.

In dimension ZLR_CONN, we define association to Hierarchy view - ZLR_CONN_HIERARCHY as

 

association [0..*] to ZLR_CONN_HIERARCHY as _hier on $projection.carrid = _hier.carrid

and $projection.connid = _hier.connid

and also use following annotation for the field connid.

 

@ObjectModel.hierarchy.association: '_hier'

key connid,

 

 

@EndUserText.label: 'using new way of Hierarchy'
@Analytics : { dataCategory: #DIMENSION, dataExtraction.enabled: true }
@ObjectModel.representativeKey: 'connid'
define view entity ZLR_CONN as select from zoq_spfli

  association [0..*] to ZLR_CONN_HIERARCHY as _hier             on  $projection.carrid = _hier.carrid
                                                                      and $projection.connid = _hier.connid

  association [1]    to ZOQ_AIRLINE              as _airline          on  $projection.carrid = _airline.carrid

  association [1]    to ZOQ_CITY_FROM            as _cityfrom         on  $projection.countryfrom = _cityfrom.country
                                                                      and $projection.cityfrom    = _cityfrom.city

  association [1]    to ZOQ_CITY_TO              as _cityto           on  $projection.countryto = _cityto.country
                                                                      and $projection.cityto    = _cityto.city

  association [0..*] to ZOQ_COUNTRY_TEXT         as _text_countryfrom on  $projection.countryfrom = _text_countryfrom.country

  association [0..*] to ZOQ_COUNTRY_TEXT         as _text_countryto   on  $projection.countryto = _text_countryto.country

  association [1] to ZOQ_AIRPORT              as _airportfrom      on  $projection.airportfrom = _airportfrom.AirportID

  association [1] to ZOQ_AIRPORT_TEXT         as _text_airportto   on  $projection.airportto = _text_airportto.id

{
      @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_airline'
  key carrid,
      @ObjectModel.hierarchy.association: '_hier'
  key connid,
      @ObjectModel.text.association: '_text_countryfrom'
      countryfr                                as countryfrom,
      @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_cityfrom'
      cityfrom,  
//      @analytics.hidden: false
//      @Semantics.spatialData.srid.value : '3857'
//      @Semantics.spatialData.type : [#POINT]      
//      _cityfrom.geopoint                       as geoCoordinates,
      @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_airportfrom'
      airpfrom                                 as airportfrom,
      @ObjectModel.text.association: '_text_countryto'
      countryto,
      @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_cityto'
      cityto,
      @ObjectModel.text.association: '_text_airportto'
      airpto                                   as airportto, 
      fltime                                   as flighttime,
      deptime,
      arrtime,
   //   @Semantics.unitOfMeasure: true - Not relevent for view entities
      distid,      
      @DefaultAggregation: #MAX
      @Semantics.quantity.unitOfMeasure : 'distid'
      distance,
      fltype,
      period,

      @Semantics.systemDate.createdAt
  @Consumption.filter: 
  {
    selectionType: #RANGE,
    multipleSelections: true,
    mandatory: false
  }
      //      cast (concat( '20160322' , deptime ) as rstimestmp ) as createdAt,
      cast ( '20160322235959' as rstimestmp )  as createdAt,

      _airline,
      _cityfrom,
      _cityto,
      _text_countryfrom,
      _text_countryto,
      _airportfrom,
      _text_airportto,
      _hier

}

 

 and query is based on this dimension.

Regarding LRN-161237 in 2H 2024 release, the Credit Hours, Type and Ratings columns will be removed from the Learning History View. Is there any option that allows admins to retain this information?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Sales order item gets "Fully delivered" status even if partial qty
entry.content:
Hi,
I faced the similar issue. Issue is in the Item Category.
Go to VOV7, remove the Item Type if it is set to either 'A' or 'B'.

entry.title: Can Compensation reference salary from Payroll rather than EC?
entry.content:
The Powers That Be have decided to redesign the entire bonus process.  They now want to pay quarterly bonuses, based on EARNED salary for the previous months and the company performance.  This means that the Compensation module needs to reference payroll run results rather than the EC reward data.  We have no idea whether this is possible, and I can’t find an answer from Mr Google.

We do have payroll run results imported into EC, but no idea whether Compensation is flexible enough to use "other" data.

Any guidance gratefully received!

Emily

entry.title: Re: Automatically confirm WT using layout-oriented storag...
entry.content:
Hello @mrbeam 

Alternatively to @Mrak1 proposal you could uncheck "confirm removal" in K point storage type configuration and "confirm putaway" in GI storage type. That would also make WT confirm automatically.

Best regards

Dominik

entry.title: Re: SAC Data Action - Calculating Allocation % is not sum...
entry.content:
@zee_siddique 

Because you Kg's produced data is already with 7 decimals, when you calculate the Allocation weight, it will require more than 7 decimal precision to get an exact sum of 1. In Excel its summing to 100% or 1 because you have more than 7 decimal precision there. Now SAC has 7 decimal precision for their measure so there is no way we can increase it. May be try to calculate the Residual amount which is not allocated and that will be 0.0000002 * Allocation Amount. You can re allocate this amount on existing weight and see if that helps. I tried it on excel and it seems to be working.

Basically I am re allocating the residual Allocation amount (0.0000002 * 1666.666667 =0.0003333) using the same weight and then adding the original Allocated amount to the residual amount. I intentionally took the amount with decimals to see if it creates precision issue.

 

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: SAP Digital Skills Initiative
entry.content:
Hi @awais7764 - I would recommend that you join the Beginner Corner and you will see a post there from @David_Chaviano where application texts can be submitted until Nov 4, 2024.
Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

I hope this helps and hope you enjoy your time in SAP Community!

entry.title: Purge External Users in 360 Reviews
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I would like to ask for your help in the following topic: we found that there are a lot of external users created due to the 360 Reviews (adding external participants). We would like to schedule a purge to delete their data (first name, last name and email) but not the answers provided.

I found some documentation mentioning that a "DRTM 360 Reviews - External User Purge" could be created for this purpose (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_PERFORMANCE_AND_GOALS/f93a40604d3f4d36a5c45560e3e483d9/5b0ce020e9a3433cb14e1cabab0f5fc0.html?locale=en-US).

However, I saw two more KBA's (https://me.sap.com/notes/3072912/E and https://me.sap.com/notes/3128427/E) using different types of purge: "Purge Inactive User" and "DRTM Master Data Purge" regarding the purge of external 360 users. But these last two, I don't think it's possible to make them recurrent.

Could you please share your insights, what should be the best approach according to your knowledge and experience?

Many thanks in advance,
Kind Regards,
Sofi

entry.title: Re: Role design strategy for SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Dhanshree

Can we have test user ID's created similar to that of on-premise system for unit testing ?According to my understanding we need to have the users created in IAS to have them accessed in S4 Public system.

Is there any other way to have multiple test users created for testing purpose without having so many users created with Email ID's in IAS?

Thanks

Ganesh

entry.title: Re: General Display Name Opt out in Second Half of 2024
entry.content:
Hi @ArjenVHooydonk ,

It is not supported to configure name format for general display name on employee level as formal name. But you can configure formal name in name format for general display name. Then formal name is used for general display name. 

Thanks

Harvey

entry.title: Re: "Error Getting Function" during RFC connection in CPI
entry.content: Did you find the solution of this issue? I am also facing the same error.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I graduated with a degree in Business Administration from the faculty of BIS, where I studied subjects such as accounting, costing, finance, and database management, all of which are integral to understanding business operations. My strong interest in SAP, particularly in the FICO module, drives my desire to further my knowledge in this area. I believe that obtaining an SAP certification will not only enhance my skills but also empower me to contribute effectively to organizations by optimizing their financial processes. This intensive represents a valuable opportunity for me to deepen my expertise and make a meaningful impact in the field of business management.

entry.title: Deleted Support Organization is still selectable as partner on ITSM Incident, RFCs, etc.
entry.content:
When assigning a support team to an incident, one can choose a support team that has been deleted from the support organization.

I believe this is possible because the business partner associated with the obsolete support organization is still valid, even though it has been flagged for deletion.  How can the obsolete support organization and the unwanted business partner be removed from the selection list for assigning partners?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Deleted Support Organization is still selectable as p...
entry.content:
You may mark the Business Partner with the flag "central lock" in the status tab in transaction BP. That should prevent it from being searchable.

 

On the other hand, you may just archive or delete the Business Partner.

Please also check SAP KBA ##1795412 - Customer / Vendor Master Data archiving, and Notes ##1825608 - Simplified Blocking and Deletion of Central Business Partner and ##2599676 - Transaction BUPA_DEL is obsolete.

 

The following help pages might help too:

  • SAP Help Document - Archiving Customer Master Data (FI-AR, SD)
  • SAP Help Document - Archiving Vendor Master Data (FI-AP)
  • SAP Help Document - Archiving in Customer/Vendor Integration

Best regards, 

 

SAP Support

entry.title: Please reset the TFA.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Please reset the TFA for one of our administrators.

 

Best Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Please reset the TFA.
entry.content:
Hi,

 

One of your administrators can send a TFA Reset Email to another administrator.

Please refer Product documentation about Admin Actions.

"Send TFA Reset Email - send the administrator a TFA reset email. Once the user clicks the link, they are able to reset their TFA device. Use this to allow the admin to add a new device or change the authentication method assigned to the current device.".

 

Best Regards,

SAP Customer Data Solutions

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello!

I'm thrilled to announce my interest in participating in SAP's digital skills initiative as I embark on a career transition from teaching chemistry to becoming a Developer – Integration Specialist. This exciting opportunity aligns perfectly with my passion for technology and my dedication to lifelong learning. I believe my analytical skills and commitment to staying current with industry trends will make me a valuable asset in this program. SAP's renowned certification program is the ideal pathway for me to gain the skills needed for a successful transition into the tech world. I eagerly anticipate the chance to contribute to this initiative and expand my career horizons.

Thank you this opportunity,

Nguyen Duy Tai (Mr.)

entry.title: Re: DRFout configuration for SAP CAR DDF
entry.content: could you please share

entry.title: Re: SAP Private linky swear with Azure – running Cloud Connector and SAP Private Link side-by-side
entry.content:
Hi @Martin-Pankraz , @gowrisankar_m2 

We are currently running our SAP workloads on Azure, and SAP BTP is being utilized extensively for various services, including mobile services. The connection between SAP BTP and our backend systems is currently facilitated through the SAP Cloud Connector.

Given the recent introduction of PLS, which allows for secure, private network connections between SAP BTP and Azure-hosted workloads without traversing the public internet, we are exploring the possibility of leveraging PLS for backend connectivity.

1. Can PLS replace SAP Cloud Connector in our current setup, where all workloads are hosted on Azure and the primary objective is to ensure secure, private communication between SAP BTP and the backend systems?

2. Principal Propagation and Identity Management:
- In scenarios requiring Principal Propagation, does SAP recommend continuing the use of SAP Cloud Connector alongside PLS?
- Does PLS alone support Principal Propagation, or is Cloud Connector necessary to handle identity management, single sign-on (SSO), and similar use cases?

3. Best Practice Guidance:
- For environments where both SAP BTP and the backend systems are hosted entirely on Azure, would SAP recommend using PLS in conjunction with Cloud Connector as a best practice?
- Are there any scenarios where SAP explicitly recommends retaining Cloud Connector even when PLS is implemented, such as for fine-grained access control, auditing/logging, or certificate-based authentication?

Thank you for your assistance, and we look forward to your expert advice.

Best regards,
Mofizur

entry.title: Re: Urgent Issue : Transport API Management with TMS to different tenant
entry.content:
@gos You need to configure the APIManagement destination correctly. Pls follow the steps -

Prerequisites

  1. You have created a service instance and service key in SAP API Management, API portal using apiportal-apiaccess plan.
  2. You have assigned the APIPortal.Administrator role to the service instance.

Configuring Destination

Use the service key credentials to configure the destination as follows - 

Name

Provide value as APIManagement.

This value is case-sensitive.

Type

HTTP

Description

You can provide a description for your reference. This field is optional.

URL

Provide the url from the service key details.

The format is: <url>/api/1.0/transportmodule/Transport

Proxy Type

Internet

Authentication

OAuth2ClientCredentials

Client ID

Provide the value of the clientid field from the service key details.

Client Secret

Provide the value of the clientsecret field from the service key details.

Token Service URL Type

Dedicated

For more information, see APIManagement Destination

entry.title: Workbooks for SAP Cloud Service
entry.content: I'm preparing to certify in SAP Service Cloud as we will implement Employee Central Service Center. With Successfactors we always use workbooks to get the customer requirements. I cannot find anything similar for SAP Cloud Service. Can you confirm if there are workbooks or what do consultants use to get the customer requirements?

entry.title: Material Flow Rules -Logistics Source and Destination Services
entry.content:
How to get the desired logistics area for inbound/ outbound process while confirming the task?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Material Flow Rules -Logistics Source and Destination...
entry.content:
To ensure the system fetches the desired logistics area, it is important to maintain material flow rules for inbound and outbound processes.

These rules should be set at the site level, specifying the required strategy at both the source and destination levels.

For more details, refer :Logistics Source and Destination Services | SAP Help Portal

There are existing articles to refer :2608268 - System is Proposing Wrong Logistics Area While Doing Post Goods Receipt (sap.com)

entry.title: Re: Archive SD scheduling agreements / VBUK-GBSTK = ' '
entry.content:
I searched also for a very long time and also tried to convince to provide a report "closing" such scheduling agreements. (similiar to VL_COMPLETE for deliveries)
But in the end only a z-report will help or delete the SA completely (is possible with this status) instead of archiving.

entry.title: Re: Copy Measures across hierarchies member using Advanced Formulas (Data Action)
entry.content:
Hi @savik 

I have a few questions about your requirements to make clear my understanding.

First,

Does the Source scope(blue square) data should be copied to 2 RED squares? It seems that the source data is not copied to the First Red square in your expected result.

Second, the measure "Value" is not copied to the Target scope in your script, but the fact data of the measure "Value" is copied on your expected result grid.

Regards,

Moonjun

entry.title: API for automatic upload of edited Test Case in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hello ,

We are looking for an option to edit an SAP Cloud ALM Test Case in the downloaded excel file, and then upload it through an API automatically. Can you please let us know the appropriate API available for this purpose?

 

Thanks & Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: API for automatic upload of edited Test Case in SAP C...
entry.content:
SAP Cloud ALM currently does not offer an API with this functionality. There is a Test Automation API, but it does not allow the upload of new/edited manual Test Cases or Excel file content. 

A roadmap item exists related to the creation of an API for Test Case uploads. There is currently no estimated delivery date for this feature, so please check back on the roadmap entry periodically for new information about the progress of the feature.

Additionally, another related feature for the Test Preparation app is (currently) planned for Q2 2025. It will allow the mass upload of new or edited test cases via the Test Preparation UI.

Until these features are delivered, the only option for Excel file upload is to use the option to upload the edited Excel file manually via the Test Preparation app.

entry.title: Rehire with New Employment Doesn't work with SAP C4C
entry.content:
We recently implemented ECP and as a result also enabled a new functionality in SF called rehire with new employment, whereby the employee is given a new assignment ID and this is used as the employee identifier going forward. Unfortunately this solution does not seem to be compatible with ECSC - the old employee ID is still being pulled out and the old employment info with it. We would need this to pull out the current employment info in ECSC as currently the old number is pulling out the old employment info and this is leading to tickets ending up in the wrong territories e.g. weekly payroll when EE is now monthly. We would therefore need a possibility to either include assignment ID in the integration mapping or to have multiple records for the same employee, or the ability to overwrite the employee information with the new employment info.

Has anyone else experienced this issue? If so, could you please vote on my influence request so that this can be acknowledged by SAP - 

Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence (sap.com)

 

Many thanks,

Oliwia

 

#successfactors

entry.title: Re: Combination Order DIMP, error "No order selected"
entry.content:
Yes, I think it was solved as he wrote: "I found the the issue, it was due to limitations and restriction on order set as per SAP standards". The link to sap.help that was provided doesn't open anymore, as it refers to an outdated release. But the documentation is still there, please see here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/34de0103497c4b80a7c7fbf6952ff971/40cfc353b677b44ce10000000a174cb4.html?locale=en-US&state=DRAFT and sub-nodes on the topic of selection and exits.

Basically, you would need to ensure that a couple of conditions are fulfilled: the Selection Profile fits, and characteristics or whatever selection criteria you use will select the right orders, also those selection performed in the exits, e.g. EXIT_SAPLMILL_OC_001. Furthermore, planning unit of measure must be the same as the base unit of measure. The original orders must have the same production plant but they can have different planning plants. Orders must not be combined orders already when combining, also no external processing allowed, no co-products allowed. 

Hope this helps,

Alfred

entry.title: Re: #COE#HHT how to put Special Character Tab to Constant field of payment file?
entry.content: Hi! Could you please clarify what is the format? Constant means constant value. You mentioned here Tab, what are your preferences here? Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Integration between SAP Cloud ALM and Dynatrace
entry.content:
Hi,

We are creating this BTP Destination to integrate SAP Cloud ALM with Dynatrace, using a new property "URL.headers.Authorization" and passing it a token generated in Dynatrace: API-Token, but we are still getting the 401 error in the end. Would you know what syntax could be used in the field where the token value is included?,or what would be another alternative configuration?

 

We are passing the token value in this format: Api-Token dt0c01.xxxxxxxxxx

https://docs.dynatrace.com/docs/dynatrace-api/basics/dynatrace-api-authentication#authenticate

Thanks in advance

Best Regards!

Hi David

My name is Sedara aanuoluwapo and I’m excited to be a part of this SAP Learning Community! I'm done with my learning part Generative AI.

I’m really looking forward to expanding my knowledge.. hoping to get my voucher soon.

entry.title: Re: Seamless planning integration between SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere - product FAQ
entry.content:
Hi @MKreitlein ,

 

You are addressing two main points if I understand correctly.

1. No possibility to load from DSP into planning tables (SAC model tables) directly. 

--> We plan to enable SAP Analytics Cloud models as targets for SAP Datasphere's transformation flows. No timeline yet

2. Virtual access to the data in SAP Datasphere (what you referred to as a composite provider like concept)

--> We are already working on a virtual consumption of data residing in SAP Datasphere for the planning models. You would be able to integrate external versions like actuals (could be plan data from another seamless planning model as well) from another fact table/view in the Datasphere space that the model is deployed to into the planning model. You cannot change this external data but you can reference it for planning. I.e., you can copy it to a plan version in your planning model or reference it in calculations, data actions...

 

With these mentioned features, I hope we get close to what you envision.

Finally on your question: You can consume the planning facts in SAP Datasphere views. We are currently designing the semantic re-use for the version dimension so that you can expose it as a master data table in the data builder and match it with your Datasphere data in which you will also have the version as a semantic type.

BR
Max

entry.title: Re: Performance issues with standard GLAccountBalanceFlow...

entry.title: Re: CAT2 timesheet posting directly to status 30 in CATSD...
entry.content:
In T-code: CAC1-

General settings:

1. Need to ticket Release on Saving.

Approval:

2. Select Without approval procedure.

entry.title: Difference between On-Hand and Available Stock
entry.content:
What is the difference between On-hand and Available stock in SAP Business ByDesign?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Difference between On-Hand and Available Stock
entry.content:
In SAP Business ByDesign, the difference between on-hand and available stock is that on-hand stock is the total amount of inventory physically available, while available stock is the on-hand stock minus any quantities reserved for open transactions.

On-hand stock
The total number of items in a warehouse, including items committed to orders 
 
Available stock
The on-hand stock minus any quantities reserved for open transactions, such as sales orders, stock transfer, and safety stock , production requests etc.

entry.title: Re: What is condition REA1 Rebate Accruals for in Sales Condition Contract? (S/4HANA Cloud)

Where can the Product Group be maintained since MM02 is not available for S4HANA retail system ?

Regards,

Amod Bhide

I've tried the option Sum or Count without success.

If you have any clue to build my CDS.

entry.title: 怎么手工填入profit center并且覆盖cost center带出来的default profit center?
entry.content:
在Public Cloud "Post General Journal Entries" app中，在填写cost center后，如何能手工填入需要的profit center从而overwrite default profit center？

以下的error会带出cost center中的default profit center并且不允许覆盖原始值：

entry.title: Re: CDS combine lines into one
entry.content:
Hi Helge,
see below example - should work with internal table and database table. Just copy and try:


TYPES: BEGIN OF ts_material,
         material TYPE matnr,
         col1     TYPE text20,
         col2     TYPE text20,
         col3     TYPE text20,
       END OF ts_material,

       tt_material TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ts_material WITH DEFAULT KEY.

DATA(t_material) = VALUE tt_material(
                                      material = '111111' ( col1 = '111111_1' ) ( col2 = '111111_2' ) ( col3 = '111111_3' )
                                      material = '222222' ( col1 = '222222_1' ) ( col2 = '222222_2' ) ( col3 = '222222_3' )
).

DATA(t_result) = VALUE tt_material( ).

SELECT FROM @t_material AS t_material     ##ITAB_KEY_IN_SELECT
  FIELDS DISTINCT
         material,
         MAX( col1 ) OVER( PARTITION BY material ) AS col1,
         MAX( col2 ) OVER( PARTITION BY material ) AS col2,
         MAX( col3 ) OVER( PARTITION BY material ) AS col3
  ORDER BY material
  INTO TABLE @t_result.

entry.title: Assistance Required for Storing Fields in Billing Document
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

I hope this message finds you well.

We are implementing functionality to store specific fields when saving a billing document, aiming to capture this information in a custom CDS View for reporting purposes.

After reviewing the SAP Help documentation, we could not find a suitable Business Add-In (BAdI) that triggers during the saving process of billing documents, particularly in the Create Billing Document app and the Billing Due List app.

Could you kindly recommend a BAdI that would align with these requirements? Your prompt assistance will be highly appreciated.

Thank you for your support.

entry.title: Re: Performance issues with standard GLAccountBalanceFlow...
entry.content: Thanks Simon. Appreciate that it's difficult to give an answer to anything performance related such as this without looking at the specific system. We did raise incidents locally to investigate, but I'm raising this here publically in case other customers are having similar issues with this one particular CDS, because it could indicate a more fundamental issue with how it has been created compared to the other CDS views which tend to work normally. I've seen this on multiple projects now, so want to make sure it's got some visibility.

entry.title: Re: FAQ about parked document for ABAPer
entry.content: Yes its very much possible to park a document using the BAPI "BAPI_ACC_DOC_POST" with populating 2 in the Doc_Status filed in Header

entry.title: Re: SAP SD Avalibality Check rule
entry.content: Check in VTLA -> Item level -< check if you have maintained the copy control for your Item category

entry.title: Re: Role design strategy for SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Many thanks Danshree
A really very detailed article, very accurately described, absolutely top from the technical side.
The concept of how to design the roles so that we end up with a comprehensive business role set that also fulfills the compliance requirements is another challenge that needs to be mastered.
From a technical point of view, absolutely top! Thank you very much. 👍
